scripts.dev: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs select && dotenv -e .env.dev -- npm run generate-sw && dotenv -e .env.dev -- astro dev --mode dev
scripts.dev:ci: dotenv -e .env.test -- npm run generate-sw && dotenv -e .env.test -- astro dev --mode test
scripts.dev:test: dotenv -e .env.test -- npm run generate-sw && dotenv -e .env.test -- astro dev --mode test
scripts.pre: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs select && APP_RUNTIME_ENV=pre dotenv -e .env.pre -- npm run generate-sw && APP_RUNTIME_ENV=pre dotenv -e .env.pre -- astro dev --mode pre
scripts.start: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs select && dotenv -e .env.dev -- npm run generate-sw && dotenv -e .env.dev -- astro dev --mode dev
scripts.build-preview: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs select && npm run syntax:check && npm run security:check && npm run update-version && npm run generate-changelog && dotenv -e .env.pre -- npm run generate-sw && dotenv -e .env.pre -- astro build && npm run postbuild:version
scripts.build: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs select && npm run syntax:check && npm run security:check && npm run update-version && npm run generate-changelog && dotenv -e .env.prod -- npm run generate-sw && dotenv -e .env.prod -- astro build --mode prod && npm run postbuild:version
scripts.build-prod: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs select && npm run syntax:check && npm run security:check && npm run update-version && npm run generate-changelog && dotenv -e .env.prod -- npm run generate-sw && dotenv -e .env.prod -- astro build --mode prod && npm run postbuild:version
scripts.deploy: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs verify-deploy && firebase deploy --only=hosting && node scripts/update-firebase-version.cjs
scripts.deploy:functions: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs select && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:hosting: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs verify-deploy && firebase deploy --only hosting && node scripts/update-firebase-version.cjs
scripts.deploy:rules: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs select && firebase deploy --only firestore && firebase deploy --only database:main
scripts.deploy:rules:test: node scripts/instance-manager.cjs select && firebase deploy --only database:tests
scripts.test:e2e:ci: npm run generate-sw && node scripts/run-e2e.js playwright/tests/e2e/ --project=chromium
scripts.build:core: npm run security:check && EXCLUDE_CONFIG=true dotenv -e .env.prod -- npm run generate-sw && dotenv -e .env.prod -- astro build --mode prod
scripts.build:update-package: npm run security:check && npm run build:core && node scripts/package-update.js
scripts.validate:full: npm test && npm run test:e2e && npm run sonar:npx
scripts.mcp:publish: node scripts/build-mcp-standalone.js && cd dist-mcp && npm install && npm publish
